upcomingFeatures.dialogDescription: We are planning these updates. Vote to tell us what matters most to you.
upcomingFeatures.saveFailed: Could not sync to server; saved locally

calendar.title: Drag-to-schedule: click the calendar, pick students, drop on a slot
calendar.description: A more visual way to build your timetable.
points: Click a date or time slot on the calendar to set the session time
Select students on the left and drag them onto the calendar
See your schedule take shape without filling long forms

studentAi.title: Student Q&A AI powered by your materials
studentAi.description: Upload teaching materials; students ask questions and the AI answers from your library.
points: Teachers upload notes, handouts, vocab lists, and other class materials
Students ask study questions without messaging you for every detail
Answers are grounded in materials you provide, not open-ended guesses

chatAi.title: WeChat / WhatsApp AI: manage classwork in chat
chatAi.description: Talk to EduSync AI from WeChat, WhatsApp, or similar apps — schedule, query, and act without opening the website.
points: Use the messaging apps you already check every day
AI connects to your calendar, classes, and student data for authorized actions
Reschedule sessions, check attendance, or get answers between classes or on the go

teacherReports.title: Periodic class reports: attendance, grades, and notes in one place
teacherReports.description: Weekly or monthly reports that roll up attendance, assignment results, teaching notes, and messages for easier student management.
points: See attendance trends and who needs a follow-up at a glance
Combine grades and assignment completion with highlights and risks
Include your teaching notes, student messages, and AI summaries to support review and parent updates

googleDrive.title: Google Drive integration: use cloud files as AI context
googleDrive.description: Connect Google Drive (more tools later) so AI can read and use the materials you already store there.
points: Sync chosen folders — no need to duplicate uploads inside EduSync
Student Q&A and teacher AI can cite the latest files from Drive
Foundation for more third-party connectors later

login.shellSubtitle: Sign in to manage classes, view your calendar, and stay in sync with your students.
login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Please use your email and password to login
login.error: Invalid email or password, please try again

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile and preferences
settings.emailNotificationsHint: Schedule changes, reschedule updates, and class reminders (day before). In-app notifications are always on.
settings.languageHint: Applies to sidebar, login, dashboard, calendar, and classes.
settings.calendarExportHint: Download your class schedule as an .ics file and import it into Apple Calendar, Google Calendar, or Outlook.
settings.calendarExportSuccess: Calendar file downloaded — import it in Apple or Google Calendar
settings.avatarInvalidType: Please choose a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.homeworkEmpty: No assignments yet. After you join a class, homework from your teacher will appear here and under Assignments in the sidebar.
dashboard.homeworkPending: You have {{count}} assignment waiting to submit. Open Assignments to upload your work.
dashboard.homeworkPending_other: You have {{count}} assignments waiting to submit. Open Assignments to upload your work.
dashboard.homeworkDone: You are caught up on homework. Check Assignments for grades and feedback.
dashboard.materialsEmptyTeacher: Upload PDFs or images from any class card under Class materials.
dashboard.materialsEmptyStudent: Your teacher has not shared any class files yet.
dashboard.pendingRescheduleEmpty: No pending requests. Students can request a new time from Calendar.
dashboard.pendingGradesEmpty: No submissions waiting for grades. When students upload homework, they will appear here.
dashboard.notificationsEmpty: You're all caught up — new alerts will show here.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.subtitleTeacher: Pick a day, add sessions, and manage your schedule
calendar.subtitleStudent: View sessions for classes you have joined
calendar.exportSuccess: Schedule downloaded — import the .ics file in your calendar app
calendar.noClassesHint: Create a class first on the Classes page before scheduling sessions.
calendar.dayEmptyHintTeacher: Select another day or add a new session.
calendar.dayEmptyHintStudent: No classes are scheduled for this day.
calendar.selectDay: Select a day to see sessions

classes.title: Classes
classes.subtitleTeacher: Create classes and share the class code with students
classes.subtitleStudent: Join a class with the code from your teacher
classes.searchPlaceholder: Search classes by name or code
classes.searchNoResults: No classes match "{{query}}". Try a different name or code.
classes.emptyTeacher: Create your first class and share the class code with students.
classes.emptyStudent: Enter a class code from your teacher to join a class.
classes.materialUploadHint: Each file up to 20 MB. Allowed: PDF, JPEG, PNG. Upload fails with a toast if the file is too large or the wrong type. There is no per-teacher total cap in the app — storage is shared by your Supabase project plan.
classes.materialsEmptyTeacher: Upload PDFs or images for students in this class.
classes.materialsEmptyStudent: Your teacher has not shared any files for this class yet.

ai.pageSubtitle: Ask about your classes, schedule, and EduSync workflows. Teacher-only.
ai.betaBody: This feature is in early testing. Answers are based on live EduSync data, but wording and coverage may change. Do not rely on it for critical decisions without checking the app.
ai.betaBodyShort: Testing only — read-only queries. Verify important details in the app.
ai.betaLimitReadOnly: Read-only for now: scheduling, attendance, tuition, and other changes still happen in the main pages.
ai.betaLimitVerify: Always verify class names, dates, and student names before acting on a reply.
ai.betaLimitFeedback: Write actions (confirm-then-execute) are coming next in this beta program.
ai.fabHint: Ask about your schedule, classes, homework, and balances — from any page.
ai.logEmpty: No conversations logged yet. Ask the AI something first.
ai.logDisabledHint: Run backend/sql/create_ai_interactions.sql in Supabase to store conversation history.
